props.title: Built for Hong Kong families
paragraphs: Siu Tin Dei helps parents discover vetted children's activities across Hong Kong — with transparent schedules, pricing, and locations.
We are starting with a focused catalogue and will expand as partner programmes join the platform.

hero.title: Siu Tin Dei
hero.subtitle: Curated children's activities in Hong Kong.

features.title: Why Siu Tin Dei
features.description: A focused starting point for parents searching for the right activities for their kids.

items.title: Vetted programs
items.description: Every activity is reviewed for safety, value, and pedagogical quality.

items.title: Hong Kong focused
items.description: Districts, languages, schedules, and pricing that match the city's reality.

items.title: Transparent booking
items.description: Clear pricing per session, per class, or per day — no surprises at checkout.
